subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a 60-foot diameter chamber at the peak open to poisonous clouds.
source_quote: The adventurers climb to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning, a 60-foot diameter chamber open to poisonous clouds above

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The peak chamber features a single iron door leading to the interior staircase.
source_quote: featuring a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy and a single iron door leading to the interior staircase

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glows with sickly green energy in the peak chamber.
source_quote: They encounter a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Fae's C crystals
fact: Felkur uses Fae's C crystals to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Felkur begins the complex process of recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals to secure their exit

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur begins a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Felkur begins a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle, requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds

subject: Daein
fact: Daein positions himself to block the single iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear position themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas prepares her bow to strike anything that emerges from the stairwell.
source_quote: Akritas prepares her bow to strike anything that emerges from the stairwell

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris arrives at the door injured and shouts threats of revenge over a forgery.
source_quote: An injured High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem arrive at the door, with Veris shouting threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon

subject: Lexicon
fact: A forgery was left in the Lexicon by the party.
source_quote: Veris shouting threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem attempts to force the door open but is initially held back.
source_quote: The stone golem attempts to force the door open but is initially held back

subject: door destruction
fact: Veris commands the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies and deal significant damage to both the golem and Varexis

subject: Varexis
fact: Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians deal significant damage to Varexis.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies and deal significant damage to both the golem and Varexis

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur, rendered invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marks the stone golem with Hunter's Mark and strikes it with a well-aimed shot.
source_quote: Akritas marks the stone golem with Hunter's Mark and strikes it with a well-aimed shot

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully installs shattered nodes and re-hardwires the crystals into the portal mechanism.
source_quote: Felkur successfully installs shattered nodes and re-hardwires the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence

subject: Varexis
fact: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders.
source_quote: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders as the battle intensifies

subject: combat status
fact: The session ends mid-combat on round 4 with 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a fire giant stronghold where the party is infiltrating a high-security spire.
source_quote: A fire giant stronghold where the party is currently infiltrating a high-security spire

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an arcanaloth and host of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: An arcanaloth and host of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen's scent
fact: Vraxen's scent is required to bypass the stone golem guarding the vault.
source_quote: His scent is required to bypass the stone golem guarding the vault

subject: Vraxen's personal journal
fact: Vraxen's personal journal found in the vault reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: his personal journal—found in the vault—reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant infused with demonic blood who attended the dinner at the Spire.
source_quote: A fire giant infused with demonic blood who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor of Mulmaster who was secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: A High Inquisitor of Mulmaster who attended the dinner and was secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear caused a commotion by jumping on the magical table during dinner.
source_quote: The party's loyal sidekick who caused a commotion by jumping on the magical table during dinner

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear inadvertently picked up Vraxen's scent while jumping on the table.
source_quote: inadvertently picking up Vraxen's scent

subject: Stone Golem
fact: The first Stone Golem is a mindless magical construct guarding the vault door.
source_quote: A mindless magical construct guarding the vault door that requires Vraxen's scent to allow passage

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A second Stone Golem accompanies Varexis to the portal chamber.
source_quote: A second stone golem later accompanies Varexis to the portal chamber

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence from Daggerford who purchased a stolen artifact for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: A fence from Daggerford who purchased a stolen artifact from a drunken Felkur for 45 gold pieces

subject: The Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch was sold to Limping Oric for 45 gold.
source_quote: sold to Limping Oric for 45 gold

subject: Phantom Ghost legend
fact: The brooch's magic inadvertently created the legend of the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: inadvertently creating the legend of the Phantom Ghost

subject: Stolen Key
fact: Daein took the stolen key from the obsidian table during dinner.
source_quote: A key taken by Daein from the obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devil hide with pages made from processed souls.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devil hide and stitched together, with pages made from processed souls that glow with an inner light

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically records and updates all infernal contracts in Maerimydra.
source_quote: It automatically records and updates all infernal contracts in Maerimydra

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: Felkur altered an entry in the Lexicon of Oaths regarding his drunken sale of an artifact.
source_quote: an entry Felkur subsequently altered

subject: Shard of crystallized Faerzess
fact: Felkur pocketed a large, pure crystal found in the vault.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal found in the vault and pocketed by Felkur

subject: Shard of crystallized Faerzess
fact: The crystal functions like a wand of the mage for an artificer's abilities.
source_quote: It functions like a wand of the mage for an artificer's abilities, granting a bonus to any artificer ability used

subject: Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil
fact: Felkur used Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil to recalibrate the permanent teleportation circle.
source_quote: used by Felkur to recalibrate the permanent teleportation circle at the spire's peak

subject: Scent Extraction Mechanism
fact: Felkur used a Scent Extraction Mechanism to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: Used here to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear so the party could fool the stone golem's security measure

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: Felkur deployed an Eldritch Cannon during the portal chamber battle.
source_quote: A magical device deployed by Felkur during the portal chamber battle that fires blasts of fire at enemies

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein used a Magical Mandolin to channel magic and cast an invisibility spell on Felkur.
source_quote: specifically employed to cast an invisibility spell on Felkur during the portal chamber battle

subject: True Seeing
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to see through illusions and magical concealment.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to see through illusions and magical concealment

subject: The Glyph-Warded Corridor
fact: The Glyph-Warded Corridor is a 50-foot long hallway with tiles enchanted with Glyphs of Warding corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway within the spire where the floor is covered in tiles, many of which are enchanted with Glyphs of Warding on tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are placed on specific floor tiles in the corridor corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: A magical trap placed on specific floor tiles in the corridor corresponding to prime numbers, designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting the gnome with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting the gnome with direct melee attacks while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Invisibility
fact: Daein cast Invisibility using his magical mandolin to hide Felkur from sight.
source_quote: Cast by Daein using his magical mandolin to hide Felkur from sight, allowing the gnome to work on the portal's mechanisms from behind a pillar without being easily targeted

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fifth level to summon spectral guardians.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fifth level, summoning spectral guardians that swirled around both the stone golem and Varexis

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas placed a Hunter's Mark on the stone golem to increase the damage of her strikes.
source_quote: A mystical brand placed by Akritas on the stone golem to increase the damage of her strikes against it
